title: General Lighthouse Fund: annual report and accounts 2024
body: "This General Lighthouse Fund annual report and accounts are a consolidated return of all General Lighthouse Authorities (GLA) expenditure and performance. The GLAs comprise:    Trinity House in its capacity as a lighthouse service Commissioners of Northern Lighthouses (known as Northern Lighthouse Board) Commissioners of Irish Lights   General Lighthouse Fund accounts have been produced since 2002.  "
